svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 『語り（sagen）』と『示し（zeigen）』: 指示型プロンプトと例示型プロンプトの対比

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 458px; height: 1px; padding-top: 110px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 論考での定義: 命題が事態を写像し述べる。語りうる内容

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(230, 242, 224), rgb(26, 36, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 532px;

div.div: 論考での定義: 命題が自身の論理形式を持つという事実。語れず示されるのみ

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 230), rgb(28, 23, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 260px; margin-left: 52px;

div.div: プロンプト対応: 明示的な指示・制約・手順を文として書く

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(230, 242, 224), rgb(26, 36, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 260px; margin-left: 532px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: プロンプト対応: 入出力ペアで形式を示す（few-shot）。パターンは名前を与えずに示す

div.div: 例: 『以下を 3 点に要約せよ』『JSON で出力せよ』『敬体で書け』

div.div:
例: Input: "apple" → Output: "果物"
Input: "car" → Output: "乗り物"
Input: "dog" → Output: ?

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 230), rgb(28, 23, 7)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 455px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 強み: 明示的で再現性が高い／弱み: 暗黙の形式を言語化しきれない

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(230, 242, 224), rgb(26, 36, 20)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 455px; margin-left: 532px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div: 強み: 複雑な形式を例の類推で伝える／弱み: 例の選定バイアスが混入する

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 515px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ※ 両者は排他ではない。プロンプト設計は『語り』と『示し』の配分を状況に応じて調整する作業である。
